    "idea": "Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'emergency dental care' signals consumer stress lifting XLY",
    "family": "consumer_stress",

      "source": "Google Trends weekly searches",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A sudden increase in emergency dental care searches often precedes discretionary spending rebounds after stress periods.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Consumer discretionary spending tends to rebound as urgent health-related stress eases."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter long XLY if weekly search interest for 'emergency dental care' rises by 15%+ over prior 2 weeks",
      "exit": "Exit after 4 weeks or if interest falls below prior 2-week average",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Dental emergency searches fluctuate often with consumer stress cycles and will reliably spike multiple times yearly."
  },
